lines.text: The Wedding Chapel, continued from last season. Chandler and Monica are about to get married.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay! (Stands up) This is it! (Claps his hands) We're gonna get married!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you sure you wanna do this?
Suddenly the doors burst open, and ROSS AND RACHEL COME OUT ARM-IN-ARM!!!!! And Rachel's carrying a bouquet!!! THEY GOT MARRIED!!!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, hello, Mrs. Ross! (Throws some rice.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, hello, Mr. Rachel! (Throws some more rice.)
They storm out into the street.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wait! (Gets her bearings) Okay!
She goes one way; he goes the other. The camera pans back to Chandler and Monica, and needless to say, they're standing there dumbstruck.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Whoa!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering with Phoebe) Come on Pheebs! Hurry! Hurry! Hurry! Hurry!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Okay! (They run into the chapel.)
Chandler and Monica are stunned again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God!! Is everybody getting married?!!
Phoebe and Joey run back out and head towards the street.

lines.speaker: Attendant
lines.text: (scolding them) N-No running in the chapel!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to her) Hey! Don't you give me any of your-Hey! (Sees Chandler and Monica standing there.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you guys doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross and Rachel left us a message saying they were getting married! Isn't that why you guys are here?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes! Well that-yes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why else would we be here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well! What happened?! Did we miss it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We actually missed it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, maybe you wouldn't have had you (turns to the attendant) run in the chapel!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is insane!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's the big deal, y'know? It's not like it's a real marriage.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, if you get married in Vegas, you're only married in Vegas.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you talking about? If you get married in Vegas you're married everywhere.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (shocked) Really?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!-Eh! Well...
Opening Credits

{Transciber's note: In case you haven't heard, Courteney Cox got married to David Arquette during hiatus and changed her name to Courteney Cox Arquette. But David was a busy boy during the off season for not only did he marry but everyone else as well. For they're all listed as Jennifer Aniston Arquette, Lisa Kudrow Arquette, in an interesting twist Matt LeBlanc Arquette, Matthew Perry Arquette, David Schwimmer Arquette, and even the creators of the show are now David Crane Arquette and Marta Kauffman Arquette. I just wonder what the new sleeping arrangements are...}
Rachel's hotel room, she's waking up with a horrendous hangover.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhh! (Looks in the mirror and sees that she still has her mustache and groans.)
Suddenly, there's movement beside her, startling her. It's Ross! He wakes up and they both start screaming in terror. Then they both grab their heads having aggravated their hangovers.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why are we in bed together?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know. Do-do you have any clothes on?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (checks) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! But we-we didn't have...sex-uh, did we? I mean, I don't remember much about last night, it was such a blur.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! I remember laughing! I laughed a lot.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And we didn't have sex.
Rachel agrees with him and starts to get out of bed.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, I mean, we were really drunk. I'm just glad we didn't do anything stupid.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (getting up) Tell me about it. (He sits up on the edge of the bed and has "Just Married" written on his back.)
The breakfast buffet, Phoebe is already sitting at the table as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Mornin' Pheebs. (Sits down.) Well, my movie has officially been canceled.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh Joey, I'm so sorry. You want some of my breakfast?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nah, I'm too depressed to eat. I'll probably eat in like 5 minutes. So I guess I'll just fly home with you guys, what time's your flight?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What about my cab?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't need that anymore.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, Joey! You borrowed my cab; you have to drive it back.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't want to drive all the way back by myself, I get so lonely. (Gets an idea.) Oh-ooh! How about you come with me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know, it's such a long trip.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It'll be great! We-we could talk, and play games! Huh? This could be our chance to like renew our friendship.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you asking me to have a frenaissance?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. Although I don't think we need one, I never stopped loving you.
Chandler and Monica enter.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, has anyone talked to Dr. and Mrs. Geller yet?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Um-hmm, yeah. They left me a message; they should be here any minute.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Where is the waitress?! I'm starving!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's a buffet man.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, here's where I win all my money back! (Gets up and heads for the buffet table with Chandler in tow.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, I gotta talk to you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! What's up? (He grabs a plate and proceeds to load it with a huge pile of scrambled eggs. Chandler just stares at him and Joey reluctantly gives him a spoonful.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica and I almost got married last night.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God! That's huge! (Hugs him.) Wait a minute, why come I wasn't invited? And who was going to be your best man? Don't say, "Ross." Do not say, "Ross."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, I just don't think Monica and I are ready to get married yet! Y'know? I mean, I love her and everything but seeing Ross and Rachel coming out of that chapel was like a, like a wake-up call that Monica and I are moving so fast. Y'know? And, how do I tell her without crushing her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! Tell her she's not marriage material.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Girls say it to me all the time! And believe me, if she's anything like me, she's just gonna be relieved.
[Pan to Monica and Phoebe having the same conversation.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How do I tell Chandler that it's too soon. It's gonna break his heart, he's not gonna think that I don't love him anymore.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well you don't.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes I do!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good! Good! I was just testing you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (returning with Joey) Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh hi! Hi! Y'know, we were just talking about bacon.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, we were talking about tennis. Tennis is more believable.
Ross and Rachel enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: The Girls
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!
They both sit down and Rachel pours them both some coffee. They're acting like nothing's happened and everyone is just staring at them.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are we gonna talk about what you guys did last night? Or...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Ross) I don't know. (To the gang.) What do you mean last night? Nothing, nothing uh, happened last night.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh! Ross invited us all to watch.
Rachel turns to Ross stunned.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rach! We weren't gonna miss our friends getting married!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) Who got married?! (Ross is as surprised to hear this as she is.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (not quite sure) You did.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! Hello! We didn't get married.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, we didn't get married! That's ridiculous!
They turn to look at each other and suddenly remember that they did in fact get married.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We-we-we-I remember being in a chapel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I-They would not let us get married when we were that drunk!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They let you get married when you're drunk! Most people who get married in Vegas are drunk!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hell, I'm drunk right now! (They all turn and look at her.) What? I can't have a mimosa with breakfast?! I'm on vacation!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you guys gonna do?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I guess we just find a divorce lawyer? (Looks at Ross.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I think, I think, Ross already has one. Now, this one's free, right? Because you paid for the first two, so the third one's free.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Laugh it up, but the joke's on you. Because we don't need to get divorced, okay? We we're just gonna get an annulment.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: An annulment? Ross! I don't think surgery's the answer here.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh-oh, that's your thing.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're thing. You're thing. Y'know? You're the guy who gets divorced.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no, that's-that's not my thing! I do not love getting divorced!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes you do! This is your third divorce! You love divorce so much you're probably gonna marry it! Then it won't work out and you're gonna have to divorce it, divorcing guy. (Pause) I'm so drunk.
The casino floor, Chandler and Monica are walking through it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, what do you think we should do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know. But I-I-I know I love you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know I love you! (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So where are we on the whole going back to the place where they have all the marriages thing? I love you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's a good question. Look umm, last night we let the dice decide. Maybe we should leave it up to fate again. I love you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, we don't get married unless there's a sign! Okay, so say uh, say you roll another eight (motions to the craps table) then there's a definite sign that we should get married.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, eight we get married, but 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 10, 11, 12 we don't get married.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sounds great.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (They approach the craps table.)

lines.speaker: Croupler
lines.text: Coming in, we got a shooter! Money please.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ready!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sarcastic) Come on eight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (deadpan) Yes, yes eight.
Monica rolls the dice.

lines.speaker: Croupler
lines.text: Eight! Easy eight. (She rolls a 3 and a 5 and they're stunned.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! I can't believe I actually rolled an eight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was so unlikely. Well, let's get married! I guess.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute. That wasn't a hard eight! Last night I rolled a hard eight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's right! It was the wrong kind of eight, no wedding! Damnit!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wanted it so bad! (Pause) Wanna go pack?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. (They go pack.) We're doing the right thing, right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh, of course we are! (They walk up to the elevators.) We left it up to fate. (Pushes the elevator button.) If we were supposed to get married there would be a clear-cut sign. (The elevator door opens to a priest reading from a bible with Chandler and Monica standing side-by-side holding each other's hands.)
Phoebe's cab, Phoebe and Joey are driving back. Phoebe is driving while Joey is sleeping.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, you have 19 questions left. Use them wisely. (Joey groans.) Come on Joey! You can't win if you don't ask any (sees that he's asleep) QUESTIONS!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (wakes up) What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, you promised me a fun road trip! We've been on the road six hours and you've been asleep for five and a half! We are switching at the next rest stop and you are going to drive all the way back! That will be your punishment, you greedy sleeper!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right. All right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! And until then you are going to sing to me because the radio's broken and you are selfish but have a nice voice.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really? I don't...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sing!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (starts singing) I wanna rock and roll all night! (Falls asleep.)
[Time lapse, Phoebe is asleep, Joey's driving and having a hard time staying awake.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to himself) Man, this is a long drive! Are my eyes open? No! (He opens his eyes and sees a hitchhiker.)
[Time lapse, Phoebe is still asleep only Joey is now passed out next to her and the car's still moving. She wakes up, sees Joey, and screams.]

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: (driving) Morning! (Phoebe screams again.)
Central Perk, Rachel is on the couch as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, hubby!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, actually um, I wanted to talk to you about that whole annulment thing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm not going to do that. (Rachel glares at him.)
Commercial Break
Central Perk, continued from earlier. Rachel starts laughing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! So, we'll just stay married.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, exactly!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And I will make everyone call me Mrs. Geller!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! This is so amazing. I uh, I really thought I'd have to talk you into this more.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, see now I'm scared because I don't actually think you're kidding.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm-I'm not kidding. Look I-I, I can't have three failed marriages. I can't. Okay? I-I am not gonna be that guy!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What-wh-what so we'll just stay married forever?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, look, how is this gonna affect you? Really? I mean you fill some form out once and a while and instead of checking the box that says Ms you check the box that says Mrs.! It's right next to it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, okay, I'm sorry. You're right. Y'know what? We absolutely can stay married, because I was under the impression that the boxes were far away from each other. All right, look, just please, take a moment here and think about what you're asking of me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm asking you to do me a favor.
{Note: Does anyone else want to smack Ross right about now? Raise your hands. Okay, put them down before you stink out the person next to you.}

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You are asking me to be your wife!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And as my wife I think you should grant me this favor.
The hallway, Chandler is helping Monica to the door.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That kid really kicked me hard on the plane.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well you did pull his hair.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He took my snack!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not getting into this again!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! Oh God, y'know what? It's really bad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I told you not to walk. Here. (Picks her up.) There. Okay. (He opens the door, carries her across the threshold, stops, backs out, and lets go of Monica who is only holding on by his neck.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This doesn't mean anything, does it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.
Phoebe's cab, she's driving, Joey's in the back seat, and the hitchhiker is riding up front with Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Joey) How could you pick up a hitchhiker?! He could be a rape-(She holds her hand in front of the hitchhiker's face), a rapist or a killer or something!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Don't you think I asked him that before he got in?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know what? I'm not talking to you! You go back to sleep! (To the hitchhiker) And you, are you a rapist?!

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Do you like car games?

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: Yeah, y'know the license plate game?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I love the license plate game!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, I'll play! I'll play!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No-No! You need your sleep. Night-night! Shh! (She closes the partition.)
Monica and Rachel's, Ross is entering.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, I know you wanted to talk to me, but I have an idea that may make you want to stay married. (Rachel shakes her head.) We register, and you get to keep all the presents!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (thinks about it for a second) No! Ross, come on! No! Listen, look I thought a lot about how to tell you this and the bottom line, Ross, is we can not stay married.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know if it's true.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh b-b-but it is!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, okay, y'know what this is? This is a difference of opinion. And when that happens in a marriage...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ross, come on! This is not, this is not a marriage!! This is the world's worst hangover! Ross, listen, if you do not get this annulment, I will!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right. All right, I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you. (He goes to leave.) Hey-hey umm, uh, is there, is there any such thing as an annulment shower?
Ross turns and leaves.
Phoebe's cab, it's the same arrangement as before.

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: Wait! Wait! There is the train station!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, okay.

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: This is where I get off. Well, I have your address and phone number.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And I have your name and the fact that you're a drifter, so the ball's pretty much in your court.

lines.speaker: Hitchhiker
lines.text: All right, see ya Pheebs. (Gets out and Phoebe drives away.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on Pheebs! I can't take this anymore! Let-let me make it up to you. Huh? (Starts singing.) Ground control to Major Tom. Commencing countdown, engines on. Take your protein pills and put your helmet on!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Stop it! Stop it no! That's not fair! Y'know I can't resist that beautiful voice!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pheebs, I am so sorry! I know I promised you a fun road trip with your friend and I didn't deliver. But-but-but now I know that you think being awake is an important part of friendship! So, so, so I will strive to-to stay awake for as long as I know you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You can still sleep at night and stuff.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, thank you. So, can we play 20 Questions now? I've got a really good one! I've been thinking about it since Kansas.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Is it a kind of hot sandwich?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Is it a meatball sub?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That is incredible! You are the master!

Monica and Rachel's, Chandler and Monica are there and Rachel is arranging a bouquet of flowers, pricks her finger on a thorn, throws the bouquet over her head, and those you who are quicker than some already know that Monica is the one who catches it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh, that's funny. You look like you're gonna be the...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, don't say it! Don't even think it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. Okay Chandler, enjoy your handful. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, should we just, should we just get married? Y'know? I mean should we just do it? All the signs are telling us to do it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm sick of the signs! It's too fast, I'm happy the way things are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Me too!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I don't want things to change! Do you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right then, then nothing changes! Everything is great! Everything stays the same! And you go unpack because it's been three days and it's driving me insane!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Jeez, relax! It's not like we're mar-ah-ah!! (Runs out.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering, slowly) Y'know I was thinking, what if I uh, unpack here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then all your stuff would be here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, what if all my stuff was here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then you'd be going back and forth all the time, I mean it doesn't make any sense.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. What if we lived together and you understand what I'm saying?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Live together? There have been no signs for that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Me asking is kind of a sign.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!!!!!
And the crowd goes wild! Well, at least the live studio audience.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes! Okay! Okay! Wait-wait-wait!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Here's your key (Gets him one.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Here's your key. All right, you have to christen it! Now, go out and come back in!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The door hasn't been locked in five years, but okay! (Runs out.) Ready?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ready!
He tries, but something happens.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, a little problem. The key broke in the lock and I can't get in!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait! Oh my God! I can't get out!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is not a sign!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, it's not a sign! It's a very old key!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's an old key!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God it's old!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I love you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you hugging the door right now.
Pause

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, me neither.
Central Perk, Rachel and Phoebe are on the couch as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, so did everything go all right with the annulment?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, yeah, no problems. It's all taken care of.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, thank you. Hey, do you guys wanna go see a movie?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah, why not?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Pheebs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No thanks, I've already seen one.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, umm, I'm gonna get my sweater. (Walks away.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. (Sits down next to Phoebe.) You uh, you wanna hear something weird?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Always.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I didn't get the annulment.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We're still married! Don't tell Rachel. See you later. (He gets up leaving Phoebe in shock.)
Ending Credits
The hallway, Joey is coming up the stairs and sees Chandler trying to open the lock.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The key's stuck in the lock.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can fix it. Hold on. (He goes and gets a screwdriver from his apartment) Look out. Look out. (Pries at the door a little bit.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (trying the handle) It still doesn't work.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not finished.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh.
Joey goes back into the apartment, runs back into the hallway, throws his shoulder against the door, and knocks it down off it's hinges.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nice job Joe! You're quite the craftsmen.
Joey pats him on the stomach and heads to bed.
End
